reasoning: CVaR stop-loss triggered on RMS.PA (-6.30%) and AIR.PA (-6.44%), both exceeding the 5% threshold. Executed immediate sell orders to crystallize losses and prevent further downside. strategy_discipline: Stop-loss rules exist to protect capital. Emotional attachment to losing positions violates the loss aversion framework. The 5% threshold was chosen based on CVaR analysis; exceeding it triggers automatic exit regardless of market sentiment or recovery hopes.
